findings.blocker: All 4 remaining sorries gated on the associator bridge lem:tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator, whose plan premise ('a clone of the braiding bridge') is FALSE: tensorObjAssoc is a hand-built 5-segment composite (inv whiskered unit · sheafification.mapIso α_p · braiding · whiskered unit · braiding), not a bare mapIso, because (A⊗B)⊗C and A⊗(B⊗C) sheafify DIFFERENT presheaves. The bridge requires matching the 5-segment composite against associator_hom_app's μ-formula — a genuine 100-200 line theorem, not a rfl-opener.

attempts.insight: Prover correctly declined to reproduce pc007 churn. Re-scope (ii) as its own iter with tensorObjAssoc_eq_loc decomposed into seams: (a) two whiskered-unit segments = μ's via isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit ↔ Localization.Monoidal.μ (both are the strong-monoidality comparison — they should be EQUAL, the real lemma to find); (b) sheafification.mapIso α_p = L'.mapIso α_p (defeq); (c) the two presheaf braidings cancel as in the braiding bridge. The section-level engine does NOT help (it is section-level; bridges are iso-level).

next_steps: Do NOT re-assign these as 'braiding-bridge clones'. Decompose tensorObjAssoc_eq_localizedAssociator (effort-breaker) into the 3 seams above before any prover. Seam (a) — proving the hand-built whiskered-unit iso EQUALS Localization.Monoidal.μ — is the keystone.
